docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE APARTMENTS, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT HOPGOOD, DESSALLIE DENISE DOES I THROUGH V INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
